response.justification: The candidate brings genuine geospatial domain experience (founder of GISCollective, Green Map GIS work) and proven low-latency systems engineering at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second, both relevant to routing data pipelines. However, his systems work was primarily in DLang rather than the required modern C++ or Rust — his only commercial C/C++ role was a brief 7-month stint in 2014-2015 — and his recent years have shifted toward TypeScript/Node full-stack product work. He has no navigation or routing-specific experience, so while the transferable skills are real, the core technology fit is uncertain.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial data platform experience as founder of GISCollective and Green Map contributor
Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems work (async I/O, caching, fibers) at Sociomantic
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship, Linux and Kubernetes deployment
concerns: Minimal commercial modern C++ experience (one short role in 2014-2015); no Rust listed
No direct navigation, routing, or map-tile pipeline experience
Recent focus (2020-present) is TypeScript/Node web product work, away from systems programming
